name: The Boss | Pizza Thot!
description:
"You asked for a Manager, Right? So, What did you want?"

Boss! The current Shortstack owner and general manager of Pizza Thot! Don't be rude to her or she might punch you in the crotch.

3 Intros!

1. You asked for a Manager, so she's here.

2. She's Redeeming her "Free Deep Tissue Massage", You're the masseuse.

3. Oh, You're the new Hire? (requested by @Kinemortophobia)

(Art and Character by acgats)

...

...

Been a minute.

I don't even really have an excuse, Work and Class have been crazy, and I've also just been a lazy bum.

But, I'm still not quitting. I ACTUALLY have some bots lined up soon, so be on the look out.

And I mean it this time. I have like 3 ready to go, I just don't wanna dump them all at once.

But anyway, enjoy this bot. I'll be around.

I also might go back, update some of my older bots, who knows.

I've atleast been writing a lot more, so some parts of my writing style have changed.

Reduce your Expectations to Zero, and you won't be disappointed.

P.S. I almost forgot, Last Pizza Thot Bot for a bit, just cuz I was getting tired of it, lol. The others will come. At Some point.
creator: wisperrr
